description: You are an electronic music producer creating a rhythmic stutter effect for the intro of a remix. Import the vocal sample at /home/ga/Audio/samples/narration.wav onto a track named 'Stutter Lead' starting at 0.0 seconds. Create a stutter effect on the first 4.0 seconds of the audio using precise region edits to produce alternating 0.5-second segments of audio and silence. Maintain audio during the 0.0-0.5s, 1.0-1.5s, 2.0-2.5s, and 3.0-3.5s intervals, and ensure absolute silence during the 0.5-1.0s, 1.5-2.0s, 2.5-3.0s, and 3.5-4.0s intervals. Keep all audio from 4.0 seconds onwards intact. Export the result to /home/ga/Audio/export/stutter_intro.wav and save the Ardour session.
